name: HatchProjectTwin
summary: Hatch a project-anchored twin from the global RAPP brainstem kernel. Sibling to twin_egg_hatcher_agent.py (which hatches from eggs/repos/cwd); this agent hatches a fresh project-anchored twin straight from the global kernel. Files live in <project_path>/.brainstem/src/rapp_brainstem; a symlink at ~/.rapp/twins/<rappid-hash>/ makes the twin discoverable by the global brainstem's built-in Twin agent. Spec-compliant rappid.json, manifest.json, HATCH_RECEIPT.json.
tagline: Project twin the global brainstem can manage. Same disk layout, same schemas, same vocab as twin_egg_hatcher.
egg_note: Stateless per call. Twin workspace is the disk artifact (~/.rapp/twins/<hash>/ → project anchor).
